default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To finalize the structure and content for launching the Tools Directory page with initial categories and language pair links.](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Launch with two categories: AI Video Translators and AI Avatars, featuring 4 language pairs each](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Manually link cards to language pair pages for now; CMS integration to be built later](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Hide additional categories and filtering options for initial launch](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Long-form content ready for both categories; Bisera to provide links for featured language pairs](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Tools Directory Structure

  - [Remove filtering component temporarily](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Update to long-form text provided for each category](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Feature 4 language pair cards per category (8 total)](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Hide additional categories for now, focus on launching with available content](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

### Content Readiness

  - [11 pages ready across different categories](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Two main categories identified: AI Video Translators and AI Avatars](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Long-form copy available for both categories](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Language pair pages ready to link from featured cards](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)

### Technical Implementation

  - [Cards currently not connected to CMS, requiring manual updates](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Future work needed to rebuild with CMS integration](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Bruna to update Webflow with provided content and links](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)

### Launch Strategy

  - [Prioritize getting the page live with available content](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Start with two categories to provide sufficient depth](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Link to language pair pages from both categories initially](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Plan to expand and refine categories in future iterations](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)

### SEO Considerations

  - [Categories help with SEO](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Need to ensure all language pairs are indexed, possibly through footer links](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bisera to send AI Avatar category copy and language pair links to Bruna](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [Bruna to update Webflow with new content and card links](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Nav to handle Cloudflare updates for API pricing page](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Team to launch Tools Directory page with two categories and 8 featured language pairs](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [Plan for future updates to add more categories and refine structure post-launch](https://fathom.video/share/sgPxKp3T5MJtLJmzHdM9u75uhFvyyekD?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)

action_items.description: Provide list of top language pairs for both AI video translator and AI avatar categories (4 each)
Send AI avatar category body copy to Bruna for Webflow update
Update Webflow tools page - add AI avatar category, update content for both categories, link 4 language pairs per category
Gather links for language pair pages once Bisera provides the list
